content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(4, 8, 1), (6, 8, 1), (2, 5, 4), (4, 5, 5), (5, 9, 8), (0, 9, 9), (4, 9, 9), (1, 5, 11), (2, 6, 13), (0, 4, 17), (2, 4, 17), (0, 2, 18), (1, 4, 19), (6, 7, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 6 exactly at time 1.

We scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node:

* Edge (4, 8, 1) has node 4 and time 1. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (6, 8, 1) has node 6 and time 1. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (2, 5, 4) has node 2 and time 4. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (4, 5, 5) has node 4 and time 5. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (5, 9, 8) has node 5 and time 8. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 9, 9) has node 0 and time 9. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 9, 9) has node 4 and time 9. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 5, 11) has node 1 and time 11. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (2, 6, 13) has node 2 and time 13. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (0, 4, 17) has node 0 and time 17. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (2, 4, 17) has node 2 and time 17. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (0, 2, 18) has node 0 and time 18. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (1, 4, 19) has node 1 and time 19. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (6, 7, 19) has node 6 and time 19. -> Add node 7.

The nodes matched are 8 and 9.

Answer: [8, 9]
